title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Global Fashion Holdings Group Limited
body: "Application number 5392  Applicant Global Fashion Group S.A. objected to the name used by Global Fashion Holdings Group Limited under the Companies Act 2006.   This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 6 November 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Global Fashion Holdings Group Limited is changed to 16074637, Ltd. "
